Double Sided Banners # Double-Sided Banners ### Custom Printed Double Sided-Banners ![Puppy Double Sided Banner | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/sliderImages/21-09-22-Double-Sided-Banners-1025x325-riot1.jpg) * [Product Overview](#d7d53b74-50b6-43f6-804e-8aff87004f23) * [Material Options](#eaf28db0-4bbd-4106-9bc9-9d4bf571d61a) * [Finishing Options](#1835512b-db38-4a10-97e1-4d13705fbab9) * [Artwork Specs](#553e2e66-a622-423a-9d76-6021dbcd74b0) * [Production Times](#a7ca9c1f-5b52-45e8-99be-91a575a22b90) * [Payment Options](#b2b51a93-da47-42c5-a40f-4e2f41686dda) * [Shipping Guidelines](#5504defa-9aa6-4e12-adea-1c2b1f4873a4) Double your exposure with double-sided banners from Banners.com. Perfect for ensuring your message is seen from every angle, these banners offer visibility in multiple directions, ideal for high-traffic areas. Think street advertising, event signage, and storefronts, double-sided banners maximize exposure and attract attention from multiple directions. **Did we answer all your questions?** If not, please give us a call at [(320) 391-5300](tel:13203915300) and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you. #### Three Customizable Double-Sided Banner Materials Made from premium vinyl, our double-sided banners are designed for durability and feature double-sided printing that prevents bleed-through and maintains clarity on both sides. Double sided banners are two seperate banners that are hemmed and put together back-to-back. They are adhered using heat and grommets. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA. Double-sided banners are rated for indoor and outdoor use and can be printed up to 6' by 30'. They are printed in full color. Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex. A 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your Customer Service Representative to discuss your specific application. **13 oz Matte** **Vinyl Banners** Our high-quality 13oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut. **13 oz Gloss Vinyl Banners** Our high-quality 13oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine to it that productes vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give it a high end look. **18 oz Vinyl Banners** Our extra heavy duty matte 18oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality. [Click here to request a sample packet of materials](https://www.banners.com/sample-packet-request) #### Finishing Options Available with reinforced hems, grommets, and pole pockets, our double-sided banners are designed for secure installation. Learn more about [banner finishing options](https://www.banners.com/vinyl-banner-finishing-options) and [grommets](https://www.banners.com/resources/what-are-banner-grommets). * Hems & Grommets * Hems Only * 2" Pole Pockets - fits a pole 3/4" in diameter * 3" Pole Pockets - fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter * 4" Pole Pockets - fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your banner. Pole pockets can either be 2", 3" or 4". We don't recommend having any text or images within 3 inches of the edge of th
